prompt: Create a full-body anime fashion character concept illustration on a clean white studio background, featuring a tall androgynous fashion model in a dramatic Japanese-Western fusion outfit. The character stands front-facing in a confident runway pose, one arm extended outward and the other slightly raised, with a powerful muscular upper body, black messy short hair, large black over-ear headphones with red accents, and the face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur with no visible facial features. Use a high-contrast glossy illustration style with sharp ink lines, painterly highlights, and luxury fashion detailing. The outfit has exactly 12 prominent visible components: 1 black kimono-style outer robe with wide flowing sleeves, 2 vivid red satin sleeve linings, 3 white fitted sleeveless chest garment, 4 layered white skirt/apron panels with metallic silver shine, 5 black underlayer trousers or hakama folds, 6 wide black waist sash, 7 red belt straps crossing the waist, 8 long red front hanging panel like a stole or tie, 9 black glossy gloves, 10 red chunky lace-up boots with white soles, 11 black-and-red headphones, 12 gold ornamental brooches, chains, tassels, and embroidered appliques. Include exactly 8 noticeable hanging tassel ornaments: two red tassels near the collar, two red tassels at the upper chest, two long gold tassels hanging from the sleeve edges, one gold tassel at the waist, and one small dangling gold charm below the front panel. The color palette should be black, white, vivid crimson red, metallic gold, and silver. Add ornate gold floral embroidery on the sleeves, skirt hem, chest, belt centerpiece, and lower robe edges, with a luxurious ceremonial costume feeling. The boots should be glossy bright red, oversized and modern, contrasting with the traditional robe silhouette. Add a subtle gray cast shadow and faint floor reflection beneath the feet. Keep the composition vertical, centered, fashion-design-sheet-like, with no text, no logo, no background scenery, and no extra characters.
